localRatingResult.rationale: The project QUALITY.md is valid, context-grounded, assessable, and aligned with authoring guidance.

ratingResult.rationale: The body explains root area, scope, needs, risks, use context, unknowns, and lifecycle posture.
Areas, factors, requirements, sources, and assessment references are scoped to the project.
Requirements can be assessed from agent-accessible evidence.
The model names evaluation history, quality log, feedback logs, and future recommendation loops.

aggregateRatingResult.rationale: Leaf area aggregate equals the target local rating.
